name: steelworksinc.ca
message: Steel Works Inc. specializes in structural steel fabrication and installation, providing precision-cut and custom-built steel components for industrial and commercial projects. They offer a range of services including overhead crane design and installation, specialized fabrication, and blast and paint services. Their intended clients include startups, product designers, mid-sized manufacturers, and industrial facilities, particularly in the mining sector. With over 30 years of experience, Steel Works Inc. is known for its commitment to quality, safety, and on-time delivery. Employees: 50 Revenue: $8.1 Million Industry: Commercial & Residential Construction  Phone Number: (705) 264-4031
